subcodes.title: Words to Ahmad Sohrab, spoken on 1915-04-15
subcodes.first_line: While surrounded with all these innumerable sufferings and calamities my mind and spirit have been working day and night gathering brilliant pearls of new Ideals... If it is in accord with the Will of God we shall take another journey into the outside world
subcodes.subjects: @universal peace; world unity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @mystical themes, @martyrs and martyrdom, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @East and West; communication between East and West, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
